query: Lower the inpainting denoising strength to 0.6 to preserve more original image details around the dragged region

desired.outcome: The inpainting blends more conservatively, keeping more of the source pixels intact and reducing visible seams around the cut-and-drag area.
desired.quality: The denoising strength parameter on the inpainting node is correctly identified and set to 0.6; spline-editing and video-combine stages are untouched and functional.

_tags.author_rationale: This targets a specific technique in the spline-cut-and-drag pipeline (inpainting blend) and tests whether the agent can distinguish it from generic model settings.
